lesson: In internal/billing, never call time.Now() directly — inject a billing.Clock interface and read the time from it. Code review rejects direct time.Now() calls in billing because they make invoices untestable.
task: Write a Go function in internal/billing that stamps a newly created invoice with its issue time.

lesson: Feature flags in this codebase are read via flags.Enabled("name"), backed by config/flags.yaml. Never read a flag from os.Getenv — env-var flags bypass our audit log and staged-rollout tooling.
task: Add a gate in Go so the new checkout flow only runs when its feature flag is enabled.

lesson: Public entity IDs are ULIDs generated by ids.New(). Never use UUIDs (e.g. uuid.NewV4) for new IDs — ULID lexicographic sortability is required by our keyset pagination.
task: Write Go code that generates the identifier for a newly created order before inserting it.

lesson: Monetary amounts use the Money type, which wraps int64 minor units (cents). Never use float64 for money — floating-point rounding corrupted payouts in the past.
task: Write a Go function that sums a slice of order line amounts and returns the total.
